title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun rises on the Japanese Derby. Feeling the
weight of my dream and the crowd's on her
shoulders, Rudolf is understandably a little
uptight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help her recover her composure, and the
Emperor takes to the track calm, collected, and
with her ideals held high.
